name: RevolutionEHR Optometry Practice Management API
what_it_does: RevolutionEHR REST API for cloud-based optometry EHR and practice management software. Enables AI agents to manage patient eye care records and clinical examinations, handle appointment scheduling and recall reminders, access optical dispensary inventory and frame data, manage vision insurance billing and claims, retrieve clinical measurements and prescriptions, handle contact lens ordering workflows, integrate with optical labs, and connect optometry data with patient communication systems.
use_cases: Managing patient eye care records and clinical data from optometry coordination agents
Scheduling appointments and generating recall reminders from patient engagement agents
Processing vision insurance billing from revenue cycle management agents
Managing optical frame inventory and lab orders from dispensary agents
not_for: Ophthalmology surgery without primary eye care focus
Retail optical chains without clinical OD practice management
General healthcare without optometry-specific clinical workflows
best_when: An optometry practice or eyecare group using RevolutionEHR wants AI agents to automate patient scheduling, clinical documentation, insurance billing, and optical dispensary workflows.
avoid_when: HIPAA: Patient eye care clinical data including prescriptions and health history is PHI. Vision prescription data is protected. Insurance claim automation requires billing compliance oversight.

auth.notes: RevolutionEHR uses OAuth 2.0 and API key for API access. Practice-level credentials with clinical and billing scopes. Cloud-native design enables API access without on-premises connectivity. Partner program for integrations.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — optometry practice subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-provider monthly pricing; group practice pricing available
pricing.notes: Denver, Colorado. Founded 2008. Cloud-native optometry EHR. Used by 5,000+ OD providers. Market leader for independent optometry practices. Competes with OfficeMate/Eyefinity (VSP-owned) for optometry practice management. Strong recall and patient communication tools.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: HIPAA: Eye care clinical data and prescriptions are PHI — BAA required
No public MCP server — OAuth2 and API key with partner program
No webhooks — polling required for appointment and exam updates
Vision prescription data is both PHI and medical record — dual protection applies
Contact lens ordering integrations vary by lab — separate connector setup may be required
VSP and EyeMed insurance billing via separate clearinghouse — billing integration is complex
agent_readiness.security_notes: Optometry patient PHI including prescriptions. HIPAA, SOC2, ONC. OAuth2 + API key. US data residency. BAA required. Vision prescription data protected.

security_score_components.security_notes: Optometry PHI. HIPAA, SOC2, ONC. OAuth2 + API key. US data residency. BAA required.
